title: Jawa Trade language
content:
{{Top|canon=Jawa Trade Talk}}
The '''Jawa Trade language''' was a language used by the citizens of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to communicate with the native [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] to trade and barter.

It was a simplified form of [[Jawaese/Legends|Jawaese]] that Jawas themselves had accepted to use when dealing with non-Jawas. However, Jawa Trade language did not include the pheromonally-produced emphasis that appears in Jawa language. One word is "Utinni" which is a shout of astonishment or surprise.

{{Language-stub}}
